programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: Ireland v New Zealand. Coverage of the first day of the one-off Test from Civil Service Cricket Club in Stormont, Belfast. This is just the third Test match to be played in Ireland and just the 13th game that they have played in history. programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: Ireland v New Zealand. Coverage of the second day of the one-off Test from Civil Service Cricket Club in Stormont, Belfast. This is the first ever meeting in this format between these two sides and Ireland's 13th Test match overall since their inaugural game in 2018. The hosts have won just three of those matches but those victories have come in their last five appearances since February 2024.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Tigers (5-3, 2-3 SEC) try to put a tumultuous period behind them as they visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (7-1, 5-0). LSU dismissed head coach Brian Kelly and athletic director Scott Woodward in the days following a 49-25 loss to Texas A&M.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 11 Sooners (7-2, 3-2 SEC) visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (8-1, 6-0) in this marquee matchup. Alabama has won eight straight after burying LSU, 20-9 out of its bye Nov. 8. Oklahoma shocked then-No. 14 Tennessee 33-27 before its week off Nov. 1.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: SEC rivals in the No. 10 Crimson Tide (9-2, 6-1) and Tigers (5-6, 1-6) meet in the Iron Bowl. Alabama leads the series 51-37-1. The Crimson Tide will earn a berth in the SEC championship game if they beat the Tigers for the sixth straight time.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Crimson Tide (10-2) and No. 3 Bulldogs (11-1) meet in the SEC championship game for the third time in five years. Alabama is 4-0 against Georgia in SEC title contests. The Bulldogs yielded a total of 22 points in the last three outings.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: In 1962, the University of Mississippi erupted in violence over integration while swelling with pride over an unbeaten football team.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Exploring the enigma of former NFL great Randy Moss leads back to his hometown of Rand, West Virginia.

programme.title: ESPN Films
programme.desc: This is the story of the history between Alabama and Auburn, the bad blood between its fans and how this intense rivalry came to a pinnacle, just when they ended up needing each other most.

programme.title: The Buddy Way
programme.desc: The historic life and career of Coach Eugene F. "Buddy" Teevens III, highlighting his championship successes as a multi-sport athlete, his pivotal role at the Manning Passing Academy, and the groundbreaking innovations he made on and off the field.

programme.title: Decade of Dominance
programme.desc: A commemorative look at the 10-year anniversary of the College Football Playoff that highlights the SEC's success across the last decade. During that time, the SEC earned 12 CFP appearances and six National Championships -- the most of any league.

programme.title: One for the Ages
programme.desc: A look back at the 2019-20 football season for the LSU Tigers, with both a behind-the-scenes and cinematic glimpse at the run by Heisman Trophy winner Joe Burrow, LSU head coach Ed Orgeron and the Bayou Bengals.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Herschel Walker overcomes bullying for being overweight and having a severe stutter to become a college football star and win the 1982 Heisman Trophy.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: The story of Sylvester Croom and his time before, during and after his role as head coach at Mississippi State.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Panthers play the red-hot No. 20 Commodores. Vanderbilt is 3-0 for the first time since 2017 after thrashing then-No. 11 South Carolina 31-7 on Sept. 13. Georgia State stunned Vanderbilt with a late touchdown to win 36-32 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 10 Tigers (5-1, 2-1) visit the No. 17 Commodores (5-1, 1-1) for an SEC showdown. LSU has won 10 straight meetings since Vanderbilt prevailed in 1990. The Tigers are fifth nationally in the fewest points allowed at 11.8 points per contest.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: A heavyweight SEC tilt pits No. 10 Vanderbilt against No. 15 Missouri. The Tigers have won five straight meetings after outlasting the Commodores in a double-overtime thriller last year. This is the first double-ranked matchup between the schools.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Commodores (7-1, 3-1 SEC) visit the No. 20 Longhorns (6-2, 3-1). Texas defeated Vanderbilt 27-24 in 2024 in the first meeting since 1928. Vandy hung on for a 17-10 victory last week as a Hail Mary pass by Missouri came up one yard short.
